api_key.title: Api Key

ConsentScope.title: ConsentScope
ConsentScope.description: What a customer has consented to. Gates enrichment and scoring.

note.title: Note
note.default: Empirical: the model is retrained for each cooperative size.

OperatorStatus.title: OperatorStatus
OperatorStatus.description: Lifecycle of a tenant (PAYG operator) in the cooperative.

RiskTier.title: RiskTier
RiskTier.description: Risk grade with documented PD cutoffs (defined in the scoring service).

ScoreView.title: ScoreView
ScoreView.description:
The two cooperative views — the core differentiator.

``SOLO``   — features from the home operator's partial history only.
``POOLED`` — features from the full cooperative history.

UserRole.title: UserRole
UserRole.description: RBAC roles. Drives authorisation in Stage 5.
